description: Integrate ICD-10 into terminology and translation support
known_blockers: National ICD-10 variants have different terms, languages, and license rules.
Diagnostic classification granularity is often broader than HPO phenotypes.
Terms, national variant selection, and payload handling must be cleared before committing ICD-10 labels, synonyms, definitions, full responses, or release payload rows.
expected_blockers: Localized variant selection must be explicit before candidate evidence is generated.
Disease-code mappings require confidence and caveat fields.
blocker_owner: track implementer until reassigned in Phase 0
fallback_path: Use metadata-only WHO/public governance records and defer WHO release payloads and national variants to source-specific terms review.

evidence_score_policy.promotion_rule: no ontology or LLM signal promotes a translation without human review

last_run.validation_command: pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation

restricted_payload_policy.commit_policy: commit metadata, schemas, bounded non-restricted samples, validation summaries, review-pack structure, and derived reports only after source terms are verified; raw, credentialed, private, full-release, and licensed payloads stay local-only
required_evidence: local-only manifest if any restricted source is touched
redaction or exclusion proof before commit

fail_fast_probe.scope: one authoritative source record, one normalized registry row, one provenance row, one candidate comparison or crosswalk edge when applicable
success_criteria: source authority and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
schema validation passes for the bounded sample
review pack marks LLM-derived content as candidate-only when present

source_governance_result.next_allowed_action: complete WHO and national variant terms review plus bounded source probe before any ICD-10 payload or label extraction
